ground_truth.title: Sparks, NV Homes for Sale & Real Estate
ground_truth.main_content: Search 429 homes for sale in Sparks and book a home tour instantly with a Redfin agent. Updated every 5 minutes, get the latest on property info, market updates, and more. 436 homes. Prepare to be impressed by this meticulously maintained and beautifully updated home situated on an oversized lot. Enjoy true peace of mind with a brand-new roof on both the home and sheds, fresh exterior and interior paint, new flooring throughout, newer water heater, updated faucets and toilets, new xeriscaping, and so much more! Upon entry, vaulted ceilings and abundant natural light create an inviting atmosphere in the living and dining areas. The chef's kitchen is a standout, featuring a Sub-Zero refrigerator, new double ovens, a 6-burner Jenn-Air gas cooktop with griddle, Rangemaster hood, in-cabinet lighting, granite countertops, solid wood cabinetry, and ample storage. The spacious primary bedroom includes a walk-in closet and an en-suite bathroom. This is not your average single-story home. With a professionally permitted addition adding approximately 350 sqft of living space, this home offers noticeably more space than many homes in the area, something you feel the moment you walk in. The added space features a spacious bedroom with a seating area, perfect for guests, multi-generational living, a home office, or a private retreat. The addition also includes a full bathroom, all completed with permits, adding real value and peace of mind. The home offers four bedrooms and two full bathrooms, all on one level. Easy living. No stairs. No wasted space. Parking is a major plus. You get a two-car garage plus space to park up to eight vehicles. Welcome to 343 Richards Way — a charming single-story home in the heart of Sparks offering classic appeal, excellent location, and tremendous potential! This well-maintained residence features 3 bedrooms and 1 full bathroom within approximately 1,044 sq. ft. of comfortable living space, perfect for first-time buyers, growing families, or savvy investors. Step inside to discover a bright and functional floor plan with ample natural light and thoughtful design. The living room flows easily to the dining area and kitchen, providing a great space for everyday living and entertaining. Each bedroom offers generous proportions and closet space, while the full bath serves the home with convenience. Contemporary Home on 10 acres, in 'Spanish Springs Valley Ranches.' The house is 1964 square feet and includes a loft with spiral staircase leading to it. River Rock hearth is warmed by the pellet stove and radiates warmth to the great room. Great room is vaulted and features floor to ceiling, vertical windows all around. Stunning valley and mountain views out every window. Primary bedroom has vaulted ceiling with floor to ceiling, vertical windows thoughtfully placed. Sliding door leads to a private deck. Attached bathroom has wonderful light for plants. It features a walk-in tub, and oversized shower, double sinks, skylights and more of those wonderful floor to ceiling windows. 1938 Historic Sparks charmer just minutes from Victorian Square! 3 bed, 2 bath with main-floor living and finished basement featuring 2 additional bedrooms and family room. Character you can't find in new builds, community you'll love living in. But don't let the vintage appeal fool you: most of the updates you'd want are already done, so you can move in and start living. The roof was replaced by the previous owner approximately in 2019, giving you major peace of mind on one of the most critical (and expensive) items a home can need. Inside, you'll find brand new laminate flooring throughout the main level (2024), durable and easy to maintain, perfect for everyday life and pet-friendly too.
